use_cases: Country or region selection in address and registration forms
Filterable dropdown for selecting from long lists of options
Location-based selection in checkout and profile forms
Form input for any application requiring item selection from a predefined list
ai_summary: A searchable country selector dropdown built with Radix UI primitives that features real-time filtering as users type. The component displays a clean, accessible select trigger with an integrated chevron icon and renders a positioned dropdown menu with filtered results. Designed for address forms, registration flows, and any UI requiring searchable single-selection input.
